sentences.text: A car has four ___s, and each one has a tyre on it.
sentences.hint: The round part of a car that turns on the road

sentences.text: The ___ makes the car go fast or slow.
sentences.hint: The part of a car that uses fuel to produce power and movement

sentences.text: Press the ___ to stop the car.
sentences.hint: The part you press with your foot to make the car stop

sentences.text: Check the ___ before you turn left or right.
sentences.hint: A piece of glass that shows what is behind you

sentences.text: The ___ is made of rubber and fits around the wheel.
sentences.hint: The rubber covering around a wheel

sentences.text: The driver's ___ is on the left side in England.
sentences.hint: The place where you sit in a car

sentences.text: Open the ___ and get into the car.
sentences.hint: The part of a car that you open and close to get in or out

sentences.text: I turn the ___ to start the car.
sentences.hint: A small metal object used to lock, unlock, or start a car

sentences.text: Turn on the ___ when you drive at night.
sentences.hint: The bright part at the front and back of a car that helps you see and be seen

sentences.text: The ___ is dirty — I can't see the road.
sentences.hint: The large piece of glass at the front of a car

sentences.text: Hold the ___ with both hands when you drive.
sentences.hint: The round object you turn with your hands to control the direction of a car

sentences.text: Put the bags in the ___ at the back of the car.
sentences.hint: The covered space at the back of a car for storing things
